Publications

Peer reviewed publications

Submitted

Piton, V., H. Giordani, R. Bourdalle-Badie and C. Pelletier: First global assessment of the Eddy-Diffusivity Mass-Flux (EDMF) parameterization for oceanic convection in NEMO: implications for global temperature and surface heat fluxes. preprint [PDF]

Conesa, P., C. Agosta, S. Charbit, C. Dumas, S. Beylat and N. Raoult: Dry snow initialization and densification over the Greenland and Antarctic ice sheets in the ORCHIDEE land surface model. preprint

Dehondt, C., P. Braconnot, O. Marti and S. Fromang: AMOC sensitivity to air-sea fluxes parametrization. preprint

Krinner, G., A. Champouillon, J. Blanchet and F. Chéruy: Iterative run-time bias corrections in an atmospheric GCM (LMDZ v6.3). preprint

Pirlet, N., T. Fichefet, M. Vancoppenolle, C. de Lavergne and N. Jourdain: Effects of a landfast ice representation on Antarctic shelf water properties and ice shelf melt simulated by NEMO4-SI3. preprint

Ortega, E., M. Vancoppenolle, C. Rousset and E. Lemaire: New Representation of Sea Ice Salt Dynamics within NEMO-SI3: Evaluation and Impacts. preprint

2026

Vancoppenolle, M., N. C. Jourdain, T. Fichefet, A. D. Fraser, F. Massonnet, P. Mathiot, G. Madec, C. Mehlmann, A. Olivé Abelló, D. P. Atwater, S. Berthet, C. Billy, A. Brearley, J. Delfieu, Y. Kostov, E. Lemaire, J. M. Marson, J. Petit, N. Pirlet, P. Wongpan, C. Burgard, C. de Lavergne, P. R. Holland, K. Hutchinson, M. Noël, E. Ortega, E. Piedagnel, P. Rampal, C. Rousset, J.-B. Sallée and M. Thomas, 2025: Why icebergs and their interactions with sea ice should be included in Earth system models? Bulletin of the American Meteorological Society, in press. doi:10.1175/BAMS-D-25-0322.1 [PDF]

Kostov, Y., P. R. Holland, K. A. Hogan, J. A. Smith, N. C. Jourdain, P. Mathiot, A. Olivé Abelló, A. H. Fleming and A. J. S. Meijers, 2026: Modelled dynamics of floating and grounded icebergs, with application to the Amundsen Sea. The Cryosphere, 20, 135-169. doi:10.5194/tc-20-135-2026 [PDF]

Vignon, E., N. Chiabrando, C. Agosta, C. Amory, V. Wiener, J. Charrel, T. Dubos and C. Genthon, 2026: Intermediate-complexity Parameterisation of Blowing Snow in the ICOLMDZ AGCM: development and first applications in Antarctica. Geoscientific Model Development, 19, 239-259. doi:10.5194/gmd-19-239-2026) [PDF]

Vignon, E., L. Raillard, A. Borella, G. Rivière and J.-B. Madeleine, 2026: Modeling the Coupled and Decoupled states of Polar Boundary-Layer Mixed-Phase Clouds. Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics, 26, 1847-1865. doi:10.5194/acp-26-1847-2026 [PDF]

2025

Yao, Y., W. Thiery, A. Ducharne, et al., 2025: Irrigation-induced land water depletion aggravated by climate change. Nature Water, 3, 1424–1435. doi:10.1038/s44221-025-00529-1 [PDF]

Arboleda-Obando, P. F., A. Ducharne, F. Cheruy and J. Ghattas, 2025: Joint evolution of irrigation, the water cycle and water resources under a strong climate change scenario from 1950 to 2100 in the IPSL-CM6. Earth System Dynamics, 16, 2201–2223. doi:10.5194/esd-16-2201-2025. [PDF]

Schmidt, G. A., K. D. Mankoff, J. L. Bamber, C. Burgard, D. Carroll, D. M. Chandler, V. Coulon, B. J. Davison, M. H. England, P. R. Holland, N. C. Jourdain, Q. Li, J. M. Marson, P. Mathiot, C. R. McMahon, T. A. Moon, R. Mottram, S. Nowicki, A. Olivé Abelló, A. G. Pauling, T. Rackow and D. Ringeisen, 2025: Datasets and protocols for including anomalous freshwater from melting ice sheets in climate simulations. Geoscientific Model Development, 18, 8333–8361. doi:10.5194/gmd-18-8333-2025 [PDF]

Torres, R., R. Waldman, G. Madec, C. de Lavergne, R. Séférian and J. Mak, 2025: An energetically and observationally constrained mesoscale parameterization for ocean climate models. Journal of Advances in Modeling Earth Systems, 17, e2025MS005394. doi:10.1029/2025MS005394 [PDF]

Bernard, E., R. Roehrig, F. Couvreux, G. Canut, C. Delire, F. Lohou, M. Lothon and B. Decharme, 2025: Process-level evaluation of the land-atmosphere interactions within CNRM-CM6-1 single-column model configuration. Journal of Advances in Modeling Earth Systems, 17, e2025MS005090. doi:10.1029/2025MS005090 [PDF]

Lambert, E. and C. Burgard, 2025: Brief communication: Sensitivity of Antarctic ice shelf melting to ocean warming across basal melt models. The Cryosphere, 19, 2495–2505. doi:10.5194/tc-19-2495-2025 [PDF]

Olivé Abelló, A., P. Mathiot, N. C. Jourdain, Y. Kostov, P. R. Holland, S. Gascoin and C. Rousset, 2025: Iceberg grounding enhances the release of freshwater on the Antarctic continental shelf. Journal of Geophysical Research: Oceans, 130, e2025JC022857. doi:10.1029/2025JC022857 [PDF]

Journal of Geophysical Research: Oceans, 130, e2024JC022032. doi:10.1029/2024JC022032 [PDF]

Burgard, C., N. C. Jourdain, C. Mosbeux, J. Caillet, P. Mathiot and C. Kittel, 2025: Ocean warming threatens the viability of 60% of Antarctic ice shelves. Nature, 647, 102–108. doi:10.1038/s41586-025-09657-w [PDF]

Borella, A., E. Vignon, O. Boucher, Y. Meurdesoif and L. Fairhead, 2025: A new prognostic parameterization of subgrid ice supersaturation and cirrus clouds in the ICOLMDZ AGCM. Journal of Advances in Modeling Earth Systems, 17, e2024MS004918. doi:10.1029/2024MS004918 [PDF]

Yao, Y., A. Ducharne, B. I. Cook, et al., 2025: Impacts of irrigation expansion on moist-heat stress based on IRRMIP results. Nature Communication, 16, 1045. doi:10.1038/s41467-025-56356-1 [PDF]

2024

Journal of Advances in Modeling Earth Systems, 16(10), e2024MS004400. doi:10.1029/2024MS004400 [PDF]

Huang, P., A. Ducharne, L. Rinchiuso, J. Polcher, L. Baratgin, V. Bastrikov and E. Sauquet, 2024: Multi-objective calibration and evaluation of the ORCHIDEE land surface model over France at high resolution. Hydrology and Earth System Sciences, 28, 4455–4476. doi:10.5194/hess-28-4455-2024 [PDF]

2026

Clément, D., 2026: Rôle des interactions entre les flux de chaleur, d’eau et de quantité de mouvement à l’interface air-mer dans la représentation du climat. PhD thesis, Paris-Saclay, Versailles-Saint-Quentin-en-Yvelines, 228 pp.[PDF]
